title: Missing topic row component with create and dismiss actions
purpose: Displays a single missing topic with its request count, dates, and action buttons for creating or dismissing the topic.
module_context: Exports a React functional component MissingTopicRow that accepts topic data and handler functions for create and dismiss actions, along with a helper function formatDate for date formatting.

steps.content: Convert the input date string into a JavaScript Date object.
Format the date object into a readable string using US locale with short month, numeric day, and numeric year.
Render a table row element with styling for borders and hover effects.
Display the topic name in a text span with appropriate styling.
Show the request count in a styled badge element with pluralization logic.
Format and display the first requested date using the formatDate helper.
Format and display the last requested date using the formatDate helper.
Render a button group containing a create button and a dismiss button with appropriate styling and click handlers.
